title: astragalus tener
intro: Astragalus tener is a type of perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and immune-boosting properties, which include stimulating the production of white blood cells and increasing the body's resilience to stress. The health benefits of Astragalus tener are attributed to its ability to enhance the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus tener is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
